label.coffee.sensory_text: Complex, refreshing and aromatic. Notes of rosehip, jasmine, and lemongrass.
label.coffee.producer_text: Origin: Huila, Colombia; Process: Profile fermented; Varieties: Gesha; Altitude: 1750 masl; Roast: Whole bean coffee roasted for filter; 33,07 USD/KG; The amount we've chosen to pay based on the quality of the coffee; Finca Las Flores; Produced together with; Las Flores; Las Flores is behind this outstanding community project, where a strong focus on fermentation expertise helps bring out next-level flavour nuances in the coffees. After the success of Finca Las Flores, the Vergara brothers expanded their work to support neighbouring farmers through a project called Peñas Blancas.
